name.description: The name of the notification hub namespace

namespace_type.description: The type of the notification hub namespace

sku_name.description: The sku name of the notification hub namespace

enabled.description: The enabled status of the notification hub namespace

tags.description: The tags of the notification hub namespace

timeouts.type: object({create: optional(string), delete: optional(string), read: optional(string), update: optional(string)})
timeouts.description: The timeouts of the notification hub namespace

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
